title: Replay Fixture Metadata
description: Meta envelope for v2.14.0 G1 fixture-replay anti-fake-green test fixtures. Records the CLI command that produced the fixture, its source origin, sanitization report, and SHA-256 checksum. Every fixture under tests/fixtures/replay/ MUST have a co-located fixture.meta.json that validates against this schema.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Bump on breaking changes; old fixtures remain valid when read with backward-compat logic.

fixtureId.description: Stable fixture identifier (lowercase + dashes). Matches the fixture basename (without extension).

envelopeKind.description: The on-disk envelope kind this fixture represents. Maps 1:1 to the parser used in replay.

producer.description: AC-1.4: every fixture MUST be produced by the peaks fixture capture CLI. Hard-coded constant — hand-written fixtures are forbidden.

producerVersion.description: CLI version that produced this fixture.

kind.description: historical-artifact = copied verbatim from .peaks/_runtime/<sid>/...; derived-variant = produced by the CLI's --variant-from <fixture> --variant <edge-case> sub-mode.

path.description: POSIX path to the source. For historical-artifact this is the original on-disk path; for derived-variant this is the parent fixture's path.

parentFixtureId.description: For derived-variant, the fixtureId of the parent fixture this variant was derived from.

variantCommand.description: For derived-variant, the CLI sub-mode invoked (e.g. 'chinese-colon', 'crlf-frontmatter', 'empty-body', 'multi-findings', 'double-format').

passed.description: true when all sanitize rules succeeded; false blocks the fixture from being committed.

rulesApplied.description: AC-1.5: 5 sanitize rule names that MUST be applied.

value.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the sanitized fixture body (excluding fixture.meta.json).

edgeCases.description: AC-1.2: each fixture MUST hit ≥1 of the 5 v2.13.x historical edge cases (or 'historical-canonical' for the unmodified ship artifact).
